tasks.description: Unify CLI eval prompts with eval-prompts.ts — delete hardcoded EVAL_PROMPTS from CLI, import from shared module
steps: Remove hardcoded EVAL_PROMPTS (lines 46-104) and local EvalPrompt interface from eval-generative.ts
Import EVAL_PROMPTS and EvalPrompt from ../src/generative/eval/eval-prompts.js
Adapt CLI to use EvalPrompt.id as prompt name and EvalPrompt.prompt as message
CLI eval runs successfully with 13 prompts from eval-prompts.ts
No hardcoded prompt definitions remain in eval-generative.ts

tasks.description: Add gradeComposition() to CLI eval script — extend RunResult, PromptAggregate, Baseline types, update report table
steps: Import gradeComposition and COMPOSITION_RULE_NAMES from composition-graders
Call gradeComposition(tree) after gradeTree(tree)
Extend RunResult with compositionReport field
Extend PromptAggregate and Baseline to include composition rule pass rates
Report table shows both structural (8) and composition (6) rule columns
--save-baseline persists composition scores
--compare shows deltas for composition rules with backward compat (N/A for old baselines)

tasks.description: Add --skills and --playground-key flags to CLI eval for A/B comparison
steps: Add --skills boolean flag and --playground-key <key> flag to CLI
Falls back to PLAYGROUND_SECRET env var when --playground-key not provided
--skills without key prints error and exits
Fetch skill IDs from GET /api/chat/skills at startup when --skills set
Include skillIds array and X-Playground-Key header in requests when --skills set
Without --skills, requests unchanged (no auth header, no skillIds)
Baselines from skills vs no-skills runs are same JSON shape

tasks.description: Wire gradeComposition() into playground Grading tab — show 14 rules (8 structural + 6 composition)
steps: Import gradeComposition and COMPOSITION_RULE_NAMES from @cloudflare/kumo/generative
Call gradeComposition(tree) in GradingTabContent runGrade callback
Store composition report in separate state
Render two sections: Structural (8 rules) and Composition (6 rules)
Score summary reflects both pass counts
Add COMPOSITION_RULE_DESCRIPTIONS map for human-readable descriptions
Debouncing preserved (runs in same runGrade callback)

tasks.description: Generate eval fixtures and capture first baseline (manual process, requires dev server)
steps: Start dev server and run CLI eval with --save-jsonl --save-baseline v0-no-skills --runs 3
Run with --skills and save v0-with-skills baseline
Compare baselines with --compare
.eval-baselines/ and .eval-outputs/ are gitignored

tasks.description: Create /playground/report eval report page with live eval, upload, A/B comparison, and trend chart
steps: Move playground.astro to playground/index.astro for nested routing
Create playground/report.astro page wrapper
Create _EvalReportPage.tsx React island
Live eval mode: Run Eval sends 13 prompts, grades progressively
Upload mode: drag-drop accepts baseline JSON files
Per-prompt pass/fail matrix (13×14 grid)
A/B comparison with deltas when two baselines loaded
Trend chart (SVG) when 3+ baselines loaded
Re-export EVAL_PROMPTS from @cloudflare/kumo/generative barrel
Auth gating: unauthenticated users see upload-only mode

notes: D1-D3 are CLI-side, D4 is playground UI, D5 requires live server, D6 is full report page
Dependency order: D1 → D2 → D5; D3 → D5; D4 + D2 → D6
